description_long: This is a whimsical, vintage-style airplane with a glossy red fuselage and a prominent yellow propeller at the front. The aircraft features a unique triple-biplane wing configuration, with three stacked sets of purple, zigzag-edged wings on each side, supported by thin struts. The cockpit is open and centrally located, with a single seat and visible control levers, surrounded by a white rim. The landing gear consists of two black wheels beneath the fuselage, and the tail section is rounded and bulbous, with a small purple tailplane. The overall design is playful and cartoonish, with exaggerated proportions and vibrant colors. The materials appear to be primarily metal and plastic, with some glass for the cockpit windshield and rubber for the tires.
description: A vibrant, cartoonish red airplane with triple purple biplane wings, a yellow propeller, and an open cockpit. The design is playful, with exaggerated features and glossy surfaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red fuselage, triple purple wings, yellow propeller, open cockpit, and two black wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the zigzag pattern of the triple purple wings and the rounded red tail section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the same features from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the yellow propeller, open cockpit, and the stacked purple wings extending outward.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Triple-biplane, low-wing configuration with straight, zigzag-edged wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and a small horizontal tailplane.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a small tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit with a white rim and visible control levers.
